ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data feed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the stock price record */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval of the stock price record (e.g., minute, hour, day) */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock during the time interval */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock during the time interval */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock during the time interval */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock during the time interval */,
  "price" TEXT /* Current price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock during the time interval */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality indicator (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock symbol (e.g., YI, PIH, PIHPP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock symbol */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock symbol was listed on the exchange */,
  "delisting_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock symbol was delisted from the exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id", "exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed (e.g., stock prices, trading volumes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data feed */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of the data feed (e.g., real-time, delayed) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data feed (e.g., minute, hour, day) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical stock price record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock price record */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the historical stock price record */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval of the historical stock price record (e.g., minute, hour, day) */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock during the time interval */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock during the time interval */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock during the time interval */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock during the time interval */,
  "price" TEXT /* Current price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock during the time interval */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality indicator (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_history_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical trading volume record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock price record */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the historical trading volume record */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval of the historical trading volume record (e.g., minute, hour, day) */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock during the time interval */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality indicator (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock price record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock price data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock price record */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "granted_by" TEXT /* User who granted the permission */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was granted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, trader, administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trend analysis */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trend analysis */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of the trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_analysis_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_analysis_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the predictive model (e.g., linear regression, neural network) */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the predictive model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_models_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_models_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)
